messages.content:
我想写个bash, 将gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/acc-phys/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/adap-org/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/alg-geom/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/ao-sci/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/arxiv/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/astro-ph/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/atom-ph/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/bayes-an/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/chao-dyn/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/chem-ph/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/cmp-lg/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/comp-gas/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/cond-mat/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/cs/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/dg-ga/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/funct-an/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/gr-qc/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/hep-ex/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/hep-lat/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/hep-ph/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/hep-th/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/math-ph/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/math/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/mtrl-th/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/nlin/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/nucl-ex/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/nucl-th/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/patt-sol/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/physics/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/plasm-ph/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/q-alg/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/q-bio/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/quant-ph/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/solv-int/pdf
gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/supr-con/pdf  这些路径下载到/nvme/tmp/arxiv/arxiv/xxx/pdf中

下面这个 bash 会把你列的这些 `gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv/<cat>/pdf` 同步到本地 `/nvme/tmp/arxiv/arxiv/<cat>/pdf`（保持目录结构一致）。用的是 `gsutil -m rsync`，支持断点/增量同步。

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

BASE_DST="/nvme/tmp/arxiv"
BASE_SRC="gs://arxiv-dataset/arxiv"

cats=(
  acc-phys
  adap-org
  alg-geom
  ao-sci
  arxiv
  astro-ph
  atom-ph
  bayes-an
  chao-dyn
  chem-ph
  cmp-lg
  comp-gas
  cond-mat
  cs
  dg-ga
  funct-an
  gr-qc
  hep-ex
  hep-lat
  hep-ph
  hep-th
  math-ph
  math
  mtrl-th
  nlin
  nucl-ex
  nucl-th
  patt-sol
  physics
  plasm-ph
  q-alg
  q-bio
  quant-ph
  solv-int
  supr-con
)

for c in "${cats[@]}"; do
  src="${BASE_SRC}/${c}/pdf"
  dst="${BASE_DST}/arxiv/${c}/pdf"

  mkdir -p "$dst"
  echo "Sync: $src -> $dst"
  gsutil -m rsync -r "$src" "$dst"
done
```

使用方法：
```bash
chmod +x download_arxiv_pdfs.sh
./download_arxiv_pdfs.sh
```

如果你希望“只下载缺失文件，不删除本地多余文件”，可以把 `rsync` 换成 `gsutil -m cp -n -r "$src"/* "$dst"/`（但会更慢、也不如 rsync 适合重复执行）。
